name: milpa/devtools
description: The coa generate-verify-inspect developer loop for the Milpa PHP framework: deterministic controller/entity scaffolding (Make engine), framework health + plugin-manifest + capability-graph validators, and BaseController/Doctrine-entity convention verifiers.

suggest.doctrine/orm: Required to scaffold or verify Doctrine entities (coa:make entity / EntityVerifier) — the CONTROLLER path never needs it.
